scripts.setup:
# Install uv if missing, then sync dev deps
command -v uv >/dev/null || pip3 install uv --break-system-packages
uv sync --group dev

# Set up pre-commit hooks
uv run pre-commit install 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.run:
# Lint with ruff
uv run ruff check .

# Run tests
uv run pytest tests/ -v
scripts.archive:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
cd "$(dirname "$0")"

# Remove virtual env and caches
rm -rf .venv .pytest_cache .ruff_cache 2>/dev/null || true
find . -type d -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
rm -f *.log 2>/dev/null || true
